ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number assigned to the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stream the student is enrolled in */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the student is enrolled in */,
  "year_of_passing" INTEGER /* Year the student is expected to pass out */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the student was admitted to the institution */,
  "current_semester" INTEGER /* Current semester of the student */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Current Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Student status (e.g., Active, On Hold, Graduated) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty advisor of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stream */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "minimum_credits_required" INTEGER /* Minimum credits required to complete the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch (e.g., Computer Science and Engineering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "minimum_credits_required" INTEGER /* Minimum credits required to complete the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester of the enrollment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Dropped, In Progress) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Assistant Professor, Professor) */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the faculty member joined the institution */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Computer Science and Engineering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-faculty assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member assigned to the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester of the assignment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assignment */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the faculty member is the primary instructor for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement (e.g., Core Courses, Electives) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "required_courses" TEXT /* List of required courses (comma-separated course IDs) */,
  "total_credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to fulfill this requirement */,
  "min_gpa" TEXT /* Minimum GPA required to fulfill the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degree_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program (e.g., B.Tech in CSE) */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stream the program belongs to */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the program belongs to */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "total_credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to complete the program */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the program is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Faculty, Student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
